ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 95% Irish Chicken Wings, 5% Peri Peri Glaze (Sugar, Maize Starch, Spices, Demerara Sugar, Salt, Tomato Powder, Onion Powder, Garlic Powder, Yeast Extract, Potato Starch, Acid: Citric Acid; Acidity Regulator: Sodium Acetate; Paprika Extract, Natural Flavouring).
